entry.title: we are the same blood, all of us
entry.summary:
Author: youcantsaveeveryone

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,979Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 57

Summary: Adriana Diaz is 24, fresh out of college and armed with little more than a degree, no plan to use it, a recently-imploded social life, and a bank account hovering dangerously close to overdraft. She scrolls through an embarrassingly sparse message history to find a text from 2019, and mouths a quiet thanks to the cloud for saving it. She messily scribbles the address '4995 South Bedford Street' onto a post-it, recalling a house she last saw for her sister-in-law’s funeral. She guess that she was no longer welcome in Houston, after her graduation ceremony and cold shoulders that came with it. El Paso certainly has nothing to offer beyond disappointed sighs and disapproving glares from her parents. And so she gets in her tiny, wheezing silver Nissan and heads west toward Los Angeles.Or; Adriana Diaz arrives at Eddie's door one summer afternoon and finds her brother co-parenting two children with his best friend. She flounders around in search of purpose, friends, and maybe some way to save her brother from his own obliviousness.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: birthday boy
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,252Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Buck's eyes fluttered open. The ceiling swam into focus for half a second before his gaze dragged downward. His boyfriend’s dark hair was an absolute disaster, sticking up in every direction, and his broad shoulders were bracketing Buck’s thighs. He was hovering right over the junction of Buck's legs, his face buried in the slick warmth Buck hadn't even realized his body was producing yet. As Buck let out a confused, raspy breath, Eddie’s dark eyes flicked up. He looked sleepy and heavy lidded, those deep brown eyes catching the morning light and glittering with something that looked a lot like mischief. "Happy birthday," Eddie murmured against him, the words vibrating through sensitive flesh.   /// Buck woke up in the morning of his birthday to Eddie licking into his pussy.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: hot stud shows you how he loves it touched
entry.summary:
Author: Llexeh

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 35,696Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 128

Summary: “Are you -“ “Am I teasing my dick with my palm while thinking about your thighs and how they’d feel around my head? You bet,” Eddie chuckles. This time, Buck’s moan is loud and unabashed. “Whatever you want, Eds. Anything you want.” “God, Buck, I want to touch you everywhere. I want to spread you over my lap, face up so I can see your eyes. You’re so stupidly pretty.” Buck gasps, then there’s some rustling, then the sound gets clearer; Buck’s put airpods in too, also slow on the uptake. “Are you hard because of me?” There’s some smugness in his voice, Eddie knows all of Buck’s voices by heart, but also a needy breathlessness. Eddie snorts, frankly inelegant and borderline funny. “Baby, I’ve not stopped being hard since I clicked the link.”Or: Eddie Diaz, newly-minted queer (label pending), has a free afternoon and sits down to jerk off with a bit of porn. He can't quite believe the man in the video is a younger Buck, but the evidence is right there and the result is incredibly hot. He obviously calls Buck about it. They obviously end up fucking for 24 hours; they have all that time to make up for, after all.

entry.title: Skin of Earth
entry.summary:
Author: PaperFirefly

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,414Chapters: 5/30Kudos: 52

Summary: It has been five months since the events at the reservoir, and life finally seems to have settled into a new norm for Buck and Eddie. Buck is thriving, as he learns to harness the potential in his new abilities, and Eddie as always is right by his side. At home, their bond is flourishing, as they use their down time to truly embrace being a family, while the chaos of work is keeping them on their toes, as the 118 officially embrace their advanced station status. All in all, life is pretty perfect. So what happens when an unwanted phone call, an unexpected opportunity, and an unprecedented storm suddenly upend everything, and set them on a path they never could have imagined. Along with new friends they meet along the way, join Buck and Eddie as they explore the magical world of the elements, and the bonds that tie them to it. - NOTE: It is strongly recommended that you read 'Part 1: Soul of Water' before starting this fic. Much of the world building, and plot points, may not make much sense otherwise.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Placeholders: They Come And They Go
entry.summary:
Author: BuckyBoils

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,090Chapters: 3/9Kudos: 49

Summary: “Buck?” he whimpers. Buck rubs his cheek on the delicate skin right where his jugular is, voice letting out a constant rumble. He’s purring, Eddie realizes. Buck’s purring. He puts his lips on Eddie's neck, smearing blood and goo all over him, sticky and wet. And there’s a sudden flick of a tongue, a feeling that makes Eddie’s knees buckle. “Are you scared?” Buck croaks out. It’s the first thing he’s said since he came here. “For you,” Eddie says. “I’m scared for you, bud. I just wanna know what’s wrong, you know, to-to protect you, to keep you safe.” “Safe?” “Yeah. I just wanna help you, Buck. You’re my best friend.” Buck nuzzles him. “Yours.” “Yeah,” Eddie says. “So, please.” And that’s when Buck bites. ———Or Buck changes overnight. A Jennifer's Body AU.

entry.title: From Horror to Horror
entry.summary:
Author: MaddieBuckleyFan

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 98,956Chapters: 23/24Kudos: 7

Summary: Maddie and Doug are spending the day at Hersheypark. At the end of the day, as they are leaving Hersheypark, Maddie gets kidnapped. Maddie doesn’t have much fight in her as she knows if she does get out of this she is just going back to her life with Doug. Eventually she manages to fight back and she makes it out of there alive. But trying to heal from her trauma from the kidnapping is hard enough on its own and it feels completely impossible when she is still with Doug and he blames her for getting kidnapped and gets mad at her for struggling to cope.

entry.title: Just A Kiss?
entry.summary:
Author: Willy_wonkr

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,212Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 52

Summary: It was just supposed to be one kiss, meaningless. Buck was comfortable with his sexuality, Eddie was questioning. So naturally, Eddie wants to know what it's like to kiss a man and asks Buck. But that's all it was supposed to be. And it's all meaningless, right? Just one time? Yeah. Until Eddie wants to do it again, and again, until he wants, no, needs more.

entry.title: Titanium
entry.summary:
Author: Dollar

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,200Chapters: 7/10Kudos: 125

Summary: The fight with Eddie opens a crack in the walls Buck has spent years unconsciously building around his past, forcing him to untangle buried memories, past relationships, and the realization that he has spent most of his life reacting, running, and reinventing himself rather than accepting who he already was. Confronting the uncomfortable truth that his feelings for Eddie and his fear of losing him, are following the same patterns that have haunted him for years.

entry.title: Loving machine
entry.summary:
Author: Imanangleofthelord

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,200Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 17

Summary: When he and Tommy got married, everything was simply amazing. Tommy had started his job as a firefighter. Wanting to eventually be a pilot in the area of firefighting. He didn't want him to have a job, as it was dangerous, and Tommy wanted Buck home where he knew he was safe.Buck was okay with it at first. Soon arguments started to happen when Tommy wouldn't let him go to even the grocery store alone.Soon the abuse came. Small hits, here and there. Nothing major at first until one evening it had gotten so bad Buck ended up with a black eye and several bruises. Or   Buck and Maddie switch places.

entry.title: I promise that I'll love you for the rest of my life
entry.summary:
Author: danilwt13

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,606Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 9

Summary: "I'm so happy you're here with me... that you found your way to me." Buck squeezed his hand. "I'll always find my way to you." ----- Buck and Eddie finally become husbands, surrounded by everyone who has loved them through every step of the way.

entry.title: Nine Years of Almost (And The Year it Finally Stuck)
entry.summary:
Author: Writeninembers

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 65,495Chapters: 9/11Kudos: 186

Summary: It starts as a mistake. A joke. Something that doesn’t mean anything. Eddie’s birthday ends.A midnight kiss.Buck’s birthday begins. They do it every year.Over.And over.And over. For nine years.Every year.The same person. Some years are easy.Some are messy.And some… shouldn’t have happened.

entry.title: brownies, and other sweet treats
entry.summary:
Author: nineinchdove

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,001Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 103

Summary: "Buck already said I don't have to go," Chris all but yells, pointing to his dad when Eddie turns to look at him. "And Buck can't just go by himself. What if that Charlotte lady is rude to him again?" Buck rests his chin on the palm of his hand, smiling sweetly at Eddie. "Yeah, Eddie. I can't go alone, you heard what Chris said." Eddie's shoulders slump, his face falling into that kicked puppy look again. "But it's my first day off tomorrow," he tries. "Can't you like, invite Maddie?" "Oooooh," Chris sings, holding his hand over his mouth. "Someone's gonna be on the couch tonightttt~"OR: a glimpse into the life of housewife!buck
